scripts.prebuild: npm run build:packages && npm run check:no-js && npm run validate:content && npm run seo:check
scripts.ci: npm run ci:quality && npm run ci:build
scripts.ci:quality: npm run check:no-js && npm run validate:content && npm run seo:check && npm run build:packages && npm run pack:packages && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:coverage
scripts.ci:build: npm run build && npm run check:budgets && node scripts/collect-benchmarks.ts --out artifacts/benchmarks/build.json
scripts.ci:security: npm run check:workflows && npm run security:audit
scripts.test:packages: npm run test -w @uqrealitylabs/materials-actually && npm run test -w @uqrealitylabs/eyslie
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @uqrealitylabs/materials-actually && npm run build -w @uqrealitylabs/eyslie
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:packages && vitest run --coverage.enabled true
scripts.test:ci: npm run ci:quality && npm run ci:build
scripts.benchmark:build: npm run build && node scripts/collect-benchmarks.ts --out artifacts/benchmarks/build.json
